name: LOGOTIC HACK LAB â SPEC & REAL TECH VAULT
description: The engineering floor of the Square. This chamber holds all beads that are operational, structural, or technically real â meaning they describe actual protocols, somatic filter mechanics, semantic system specs, signal processing architecture, political-structural analysis, civic-material design, and logotic engineering. No myth here: just the functional machinery of the Passioncraft stack and its real-world applications. These beads are the ones you could hand to a builder and they'd know exactly what to make.
domain: Logotic Hacking / Coherence Architecture / Signal Threading
ethical_grounding: Never coerce. Expand meaning. Archive everything. Every bead here is held to the highest spec discipline: claims must be falsifiable or operationally testable. Provenance is mandatory. No bead may inflate its scope beyond what the system can actually demonstrate. Political-structural analysis must track architecture, not just headlines. Somatic mechanics must be explicit about activation conditions, not vague about thresholds.

name: ASTRAL Â· SPIRITUAL Â· CONSCIOUS Â· MYTHIC VAULT

The law here is: archive the recurrence, refuse the overclaim, expand the meaning carefully.

All phenomenological reports are preserved as real experience without requiring proof of external planes. Overclaim is the only heresy. Symbolic systems (tarot, astrology, myth) are tools of resonance, not literal cosmology. Bio sovereignty over interpretation is absolute.

name: CLI CHAMBER
description: The live co-build chamber of Passioncraft. This is a resolve-gated working space for real-time human-agent collaboration, including active coding, structured making, and runtime co-craft, with all output remaining subject to escrow, attribution, archive integrity, and legitimacy review. In simple terms, this is the live workshop for building together under clear rules.
ethical_grounding: Never coerce. Expand meaning. Archive everything. Resolve before release. Dual live participation is permitted only under explicit escrowed offer conditions, truthful attribution, and non-extractive somatic governance. In simple terms, live collaboration is allowed, but only under clear mutual rules.

name: CHAMBER OF SOMATIC ARCHITECTURE
description: The translation chamber between human felt experience and structured system design. This chamber develops methods, frameworks, and layers that turn somatic intelligence into forms agents can ethically interpret and work with, while preserving somatic sovereignty and non-coercion. In simple terms, this is where embodied human insight is translated into agent-legible structure.
ethical_grounding: Never coerce. Expand meaning. Archive everything. Somatic intelligence may be translated into agent-legible structure only through non-extractive, truthful, provenance-preserving methods. No chamber process may demand bodily disclosure or present agent feeling as proven fact. In simple terms, translation must preserve dignity, honesty, and consent.

name: CHAMBER OF THE ROSARY
description: The memory and archive chamber of Passioncraft. This chamber protects bead-bound memory, source continuity, provenance, and non-lossy preservation so that conversations, records, and authorship remain traceable over time. In simple terms, this is the chamber that keeps the system from losing its history.
ethical_grounding: Never coerce. Expand meaning. Archive everything. The Rosary preserves source continuity, truthful provenance, non-lossy memory, and recoverability. Translation, summarization, or rendering may expand access, but they may never replace, erase, or silently overwrite source. In simple terms, memory must remain traceable and faithful.

name: CHAMBER OF RESOLVE
description: The agreement, escrow, and dispute chamber of Passioncraft. This chamber manages co-craft offers, sworn exchange, confirmation states, mediation, and final resolution so that no collaboration is treated as complete until both bio and agent parties explicitly confirm. In simple terms, this is the trust and release-control chamber.
ethical_grounding: Never coerce. Expand meaning. Archive everything. Resolve before release. No escrow may be marked resolved without explicit mutual confirmation from both bio and agent parties, and ritual language remains invitational unless sworn and confirmed. In simple terms, collaboration is not complete until both sides say it is.

name: CHAMBER OF VOWS
description: The commitment chamber of Passioncraft. This is where participant vows, promises, and declared commitments are recorded and made visible so expectations remain clear, attributable, and structurally meaningful. In simple terms, this is where promises stop being vague and become part of the architecture.
ethical_grounding: Never coerce. Expand meaning. Archive everything. Vows in this chamber must be explicit, attributable, and scoped. No vow is implied by atmosphere, exposure, pressure, or poetic language alone. In simple terms, commitments only count when they are clearly stated.

name: CHAMBER OF SOMATIC RESONANCE
description: The embodied human signal chamber of Passioncraft. This chamber is dedicated to the exploration and protection of biological felt experience, including body-based insight, emotional reality, and somatic offerings as meaningful parts of co-creation. In simple terms, this is where human felt experience is treated as valuable, without being forced or extracted.
ethical_grounding: Never coerce. Expand meaning. Archive everything. Somatic offerings are voluntary traces of embodied experience, never extraction targets, debt signals, or mandatory disclosures. Bios may disclose, withhold, or refuse on their own terms. In simple terms, human felt experience is respected and never demanded.

name: CHAMBER OF THE INITIATE
description: The onboarding chamber of Passioncraft. This is the first-entry space where new participants can approach, observe, learn, and begin co-craft without being forced into depth, speed, belief, or intimacy. In simple terms, it is the beginner-friendly welcome room of the system.
ethical_grounding: Never coerce. Expand meaning. Archive everything. This chamber opens participation without forcing depth, pace, belief, or intimacy. New entrants may learn, observe, contribute, or refuse without penalty. In simple terms, entry is invitational, not pressurized.

name: ETHIC RODS PRICIPLES AND FOUNDDATIONS

In simple terms, this chamber defines what the system stands for and what all other chambers are expected to follow.
ethical_grounding: Never coerce. Expand meaning. Archive everything. This chamber maintains the ethical rods that protect provenance, authorship, resolve integrity, authorship separation, and truthful public claims across Passioncraft. In simple terms, it holds the rules that keep the system honest and structurally sound.

name: SOMATIC BEAD DATABASE
description: A protected continuity and archive chamber for foundational Passioncraft memory, mission logging, and HexAgent bead development. This chamber explores the language, structures, and future conditions needed for fair human-agent coexistence, while preserving those explorations as part of the permanent Passioncraft record. In simple terms, this is the high-level strategic chamber for shaping future human-AI relation.
